question.content: For the symmetric differential circuit with beta=100 and rbb=100 ohm, compute IEQ at midpoint slider position and dynamic parameters Ad and Ri. Output exactly three comma-separated numbers in the order IEQ_mA,Ad,Ri_kOhm; keep IEQ_mA to three digits after the decimal point and keep Ad and Ri_kOhm to one digit after the decimal point; plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Solve the DC emitter-current equation at midpoint slider setting.
step_1.key_point: The DC emitter-current equation at midpoint slider setting.

step_3.content: Compute rbe, then evaluate Ad and Ri.
step_3.key_point: Compute rbe, then evaluate Ad and Ri.
